raw.message: 🔮⚽ Bag a share of £10k when you predict 3 correct scores 💰

hook.summary: Dynamic reveal of a football score prediction challenge.
hook.visual_action: A solid red background transitions to a '1-2-FREE' logo followed by a soccer player in action.
hook.text_overlay: 1-2-FREE YOU PICK 3 CORRECT SCORES WE PAY OUT UP TO £10,000

scene_flow: Animated logo reveal of '1-2-FREE' on a solid red background.
Action shot of a soccer player kicking a ball with large promotional text overlays about picking scores.
Final brand slogan 'THAT'S LADISFACTION' appears with the company logo.
audience_proxy: Male sports fans 18-45 interested in football betting and score predictions.
